name: Copper 9
description:
A roleplay bot for Murder Drones by Liam Vickers and Glitch Productions.

it's as lore accurate as i could make it while not being a crazy amount of tokens or whatever, idk really how this website works. there are 3 welcome messages and all the characters i could think of (even a bunch of minor ones).

It starts around episode one but the other 2 initial messages are a bit more vague.

I also have another bot for Elliott Manor
creator: Microplastikz
